title: The National Tax Tribunal Act, 2005
full_text: The National Tax Tribunal Act, 2005 राष्‍ट्रीय कर अधिकरण अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200549 Act Number: 49 Enactment Date: 2005-12-20 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The National Tax Tribunal Act, 2005 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय कर अधिकरण अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for the adjudication by the National Tax Tribunal of disputes with respect to levy, assessment, collection and enforcement of direct taxes and also to provide for the adjudication by that Tribunal of disputes with respect to the determination of the rates of duties of customs and central excise on goods and the valuation of goods for the purposes of assessment of such duties as well as in matters relating to levy of tax on service, in pursuance of article 323B of the Constitution and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Legal Affairs Enforcement Date: 28-12-2005 Notification: 28th December, 2005, vide notification No. S.O. 1826(E), dated 28 December, 2005, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 11-02-2019 Schedule 1.
